title: calamagrostis viridula var. langsdorffii
intro: Calamagrostis viridula var. langsdorffii, also known as Langsdorff's green grass or Langsdorff's fescue, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Calamagrostis viridula var. langsdorffii include reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
